news.title: OpenAI alums have been quietly investing from a new, potentially $100M fund
news.summary: Zero Shot, a new venture capital fund with deep ties to OpenAI, is aiming to raise $100 million for its first fund. It has already written some checks.

news.title: Gas prices aren’t the only factor fueling used EV sales
news.summary: The most recent electric vehicle sales data provided a grim picture — at least for new EVs. Used EVs are moving in the opposite direction.

news.title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
news.summary: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.

news.title: Netflix is expanding into kids’ games with a new stand-alone app
news.summary: Netflix says the app gives children access to an "ever-growing" library of games for kids.

news.title: Why safety regulators closed their investigation into Tesla’s remote parking feature
news.summary: The NHTSA closed its investigation into Tesla's "Actually Smart Summon" feature, saying that only a fraction of cases resulted in an incident and that no incidents resulted in injury. Tesla has also issued a number of software updates.

news.title: Wisconsin governor says ‘no’ to age checks for porn
news.summary: Wisconsin Gov. Tony Evers vetoed a bill that would've required residents to verify their age before accessing porn sites, as reported earlier by 404 Media. news.title: Artemis II astronauts break a record, name a crater
news.summary: A few minutes before 2PM ET on Monday, the crew of Artemis II broke a record set 56 years ago by the ill-fated Apollo 13 mission - at over 248,655 miles, they have now traveled farther from Earth than any humans before them. news.summary: Autonomous vehicle companies are refusing to disclose key details about their use of remote assistance teams, including how often these workers are forced to intervene to help their self-driving cars. news.title: Artemis II: Everything We Know as Its Crew Approaches the Far Side of the Moon
